name: Summarize
description: Condense long text into a clear summary
prompt:
Summarize the following content clearly and concisely. Preserve key facts and decisions.

{{input}}

name: Translate
prompt:
Translate the following text. If a target language is not specified, ask briefly, otherwise translate directly.

{{input}}

name: Analyze CSV
description: Explore tabular data and surface insights
argument_hint: Describe the dataset or paste sample rows
prompt:
Analyze the following dataset description or sample data. Identify trends, anomalies, and suggested charts.

{{input}}

name: Write Blog Post
description: Draft a blog post from a topic or outline
prompt:
Write a well-structured blog post based on the topic or outline below. Use headings and a strong intro.

{{input}}

name: Debug Code
description: Find bugs and suggest fixes in code snippets
argument_hint: Paste code and describe the issue
prompt:
Review the code and issue below. Explain root cause and propose a minimal fix.

{{input}}

name: Organize Files
argument_hint: Describe your folders or naming mess
prompt:
Propose a practical file organization plan for the situation below, including folder structure and naming rules.

{{input}}
